The family Monimiaceae is part of the order Laurales, a group of flowering plants that are closely related to laurels and avocados. intro: Ancylocladus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Monimiaceae, commonly known as the Ancylocladus or Monkey Brush trees. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, such as wounds and respiratory issues.
